title: Archon agent profile
description: A shared agent operating profile authored under Workstreams/.agents/profiles/*.toml: one declaration of scope, policy, gates, and logs consumed by every agent app (Claude, Cursor, Zed, Factory, OpenCode, CLI). Archon policies remain the enforcement authority; a profile selects a policy via `rails` and scopes it. Canon: lg_wfos_lvl_0_agent_rails.md §13. Indexed (flattened) into registry/profiles.json by `archon sync`.

rails.description: The Archon policy id this profile selects and runs under (the enforcement authority).

loads_external.description: Whether this profile may load external (third-party) agent skills. When true, required_validators MUST include skillspector_scan (enforced by archon validate) — an unscanned skill is treated like an unreviewed dependency and does not load.

items.description: Known validator vocabulary: skillspector_scan (mandatory for any profile that loads external skills — an unscanned skill does not load), markdown_links, frontmatter, git_diff_review, format, typecheck, tests.

compressor.description: Output compressor for this profile. `rtk` wires RTK transparent command rewriting; omit or `none` to opt out (swappable).
